Joseph P. McMonigle, Esq. of LONG & LEVIT LLP 397-2222 for defendant MEDLEN & CARROLL opposing party
Counsel represented in open court that both parties have stipulated that judgment will be entered on April 9, 2002 if payment is not made by that date.
